content: I found cheap flights to Paris for April.
Amazing. Which dates are you considering?
That gives you almost a full week in Paris.
I really want to see the Eiffel Tower at night.
Night views from Trocadero are perfect for that.
Day two I want the Louvre and maybe Seine cruise.
Book Louvre tickets early to avoid lines.
I should learn basic French phrases first.
I can help you practice useful phrases.
Hotel budget is around 150 euros per night.
We can compare hotels in the 7th and 11th districts.
I also want a day trip to Versailles.
Great idea. Take the RER C early in the morning.
Please remind me to buy museum pass.
